name: the-standard-comprehension-gate
description: Ensures the human demonstrably understands any impactful, hard-to-reverse action before it is taken, by actively verifying comprehension with project-anchored questions rather than accepting assertion. Applies to commits, pushes, deploys, migrations, destructive scripts, and any state-changing or outward-facing action.
inputs: An about-to-run impactful action (commit, push, merge, deploy, migration, destructive query, side-effecting script, infra/config/secret change, file deletion)
The diff or command and its blast radius
The human's answers to comprehension questions
outputs: Project-anchored comprehension questions scaled to risk
An honest verdict on each answer (correct / partial / wrong)
Escalated follow-up questions when answers miss
A decision: proceed (understanding proven), hold (do not act), or redesign the action
A deliberate, explicit override record when the human knowingly accepts unverified risk

activation.trigger: about to commit, push, merge, deploy, run a migration or side-effecting script, delete data or files, or change infra/config/secrets — any hard-to-reverse, shared-state, or outward-facing action
activation.note: Standalone skill with no prerequisites. Do not activate for read-only or trivially reversible local work.
